title: Near 52-Week High Positions
subtitle: Identify holdings trading within 2% of their peak prices

blocks.title: Proximity Summary

dataContract.description: Count and value of positions near high

blocks.sub_question: How many portfolio positions are currently within 2% of their 52-week high and what is the total market value of these specific positions?

blocks.title: Positions Near High

dataContract.description: Detailed list of positions within 2% of high

blocks.sub_question: Which portfolio positions are currently within 2% of their 52-week high, showing ticker, current price, 52-week high price, and percentage difference?

blocks.title: Closest to High

dataContract.description: Ranked list by proximity to 52-week high

blocks.sub_question: Rank the portfolio positions currently within 2% of their 52-week high by their percentage distance from the high, showing the closest first.

blocks.title: Distance Comparison

dataContract.description: Percentage distance from 52-week high

blocks.sub_question: What is the percentage distance from the 52-week high for each portfolio position currently within 2% of that high?

original_question: Which positions are within 2% of their 52-week high?

title: Near 52-Week Low Positions
subtitle: Overview of portfolio positions trading near yearly lows

blocks.title: Near Low Summary

dataContract.description: Total count of positions near 52-week lows

blocks.title: Positions Near Lows

dataContract.description: Detailed list of positions near lows

blocks.sub_question: Which positions are currently within 2% of their 52-week low, displaying ticker, current price, and 52-week low?

blocks.title: Distance to Low

dataContract.description: Ranked distance from 52-week low

blocks.sub_question: What are the percentage distances from the 52-week low for positions within 2% of that low?

blocks.title: 30-Day Trends

dataContract.description: Recent price performance for near-low positions

blocks.sub_question: What is the 30-day price history for positions currently within 2% of their 52-week low?

original_question: Which positions are within 2% of their 52-week low?

title: 52-Week Range Dashboard
subtitle: 52-week high and low analysis for open positions

blocks.title: Position Range Summary

dataContract.description: Summary metrics for positions relative to 52-week range

blocks.title: 52-Week Range Table

dataContract.description: List of positions with 52-week high and low values

blocks.sub_question: What are all open positions with their current prices, 52-week highs, and 52-week lows?

blocks.title: Price vs 52-Week High

dataContract.description: Current price as percentage of 52-week high

blocks.sub_question: What is the current price expressed as a percentage of the 52-week high for each open position?

blocks.title: Near 52-Week Highs

dataContract.description: Positions ranked by proximity to 52-week high

blocks.sub_question: Which open positions are closest to their 52-week highs, ranked by percentage difference from the high?

original_question: For each open position, what is the 52-week high and low?

title: Position Volume Analysis
subtitle: Average daily volume metrics for all open positions over the last 30 trading days

dataContract.description: Key volume statistics across all open positions

dataContract.description: List of all open positions with average daily volume

dataContract.description: Open positions ranked by average daily volume

dataContract.description: Visual comparison of average daily volume per position

blocks.sub_question: What is the average daily volume over the last 30 trading days for the top 10 open positions by portfolio weight?
